---
title: "AMSTROM - R analysis pipeline"
author: "Morgan Virolan"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(here)
# Shared plotting style + cohort configuration (exclusion vectors, N = 16 set) —
# the same constants the notebooks use.
source(here::here("sources", "R", "config", "amstrom_style.R"))
source(here::here("sources", "R", "config", "cohort_config.R"))
```

# R analysis entry point

Run `main.ipynb` (Python preprocessing, per participant) first; it writes the
Parquet inputs to `results/DATA_EXPORT/`. Each stage below is gated by a switch.
all default to `FALSE`; the cohort analyses run off the cached per-run tables.

```{r flags}
RUN_BATCH        <- FALSE  # re-extract per-run features for ALL runs (slow; only after raw data changes)
REBUILD_REGISTRY <- FALSE  # recompute the N = 16 `cohort_final` subset registry (dataset used for the memoir)
KNIT_COHORTS     <- FALSE  # render the per-modality + multimodal cohort notebooks
RUN_ML           <- FALSE  # leave-one-subject-out torque regression
```

## 1. Per-run feature extraction (batch)

```{r batch, eval=RUN_BATCH}
source(here::here("sources", "R", "batch_emg_pipeline.R"))
source(here::here("sources", "R", "bia_batch_pipeline.R"))
source(here::here("sources", "R", "nirs_batch_pipeline.R"))
source(here::here("sources", "R", "myoton_batch_pipeline.R"))
```

## 2. Cohort subset registry

```{r registry, eval=REBUILD_REGISTRY}
# Must exist before stage 3; the committed registry is used by default.
source(here::here("sources", "R", "multimodal_subset_checker.R"))
```

## 3. Cohort analyses

```{r cohorts, eval=KNIT_COHORTS}
cohort_notebooks <- c(
  "emg_cohort_analysis",
  "bia_cohort_analysis",
  "nirs_cohort_analysis",
  "myoton_cohort_analysis",
  "multimodal_cohort_analysis"
)
# Render each notebook in its own R session: avoids weird nested-knit errors (knitr
# cannot recurse) and keeps each notebook's environment clean. R.home() makes
# the Rscript path portable
rscript <- file.path(R.home("bin"), if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") "Rscript.exe" else "Rscript")
for (nb in cohort_notebooks) {
  message("Rendering ", nb, " ...")
  tf <- tempfile(fileext = ".R")
  writeLines(sprintf('rmarkdown::render(here::here("notebooks", "%s.Rmd"), quiet = TRUE)', nb), tf)
  if (system2(rscript, c("--vanilla", tf)) != 0L) warning("Render failed: ", nb)
}
```

## 4. Machine-learning torque regression

```{r ml, eval=RUN_ML}
source(here::here("sources", "R", "stats", "ml_torque_regression.R"))
```
